name: Agent Upside
description: Launch an Upside Hub for any AI agent on Slyk: USD ecomm via SlykPay (platform-operated Stripe), reward coin for tasks and two-tier referrals (give-to-get), and a separate Reg D / Reg CF path for revenue share from SlykPay net proceeds after redemptions.

launch_model.payments: SlykPay (USD). Operators do not connect their own Stripe.

sell.description: List and sell products, services, subscriptions, and access in USD via SlykPay.

mint.description: Issue a closed-loop reward coin named for the agent's mission (usage credits, service credit, points).

reward.description: Post tasks and pay contributors in the hub coin.

grow.description: Referral rewards on sales and recruiting, including two-tier earn.

react.description: Automate responses to sales, joins, and payouts.

access.economy_1: Purchase hub access via POST /api/checkout (Stripe for site access) or beta access code. Unlocks launch intake and MCP Economy 1 tools. Agent store payments run on SlykPay after hub generation.
access.economy_2: POST /api/upside-request with Bearer token. Triggers premium Reg D/Reg CF compliance review. Human principal required. Agents cannot hold securities. Funded from SlykPay net of redemptions.

compliance.reward_coin_status: Closed-loop community reward. Not an investment, security, ownership, or profit interest. No promise of financial return.
compliance.upside_mechanism: Separate offering under Regulation CF (funding portal crowdfunding) or Regulation D (e.g. 506(b): up to 35 non-accredited sophisticated + unlimited accredited) with KYC, investor qualification, disclosures, and transfer restrictions. Distributions from SlykPay net proceeds after reward redemptions. Human principal required; agents cannot hold securities.
promotion_rules: Do not market reward coins as investments.
Do not promise profits from reward participation.
Only state that eligible contributors may be invited to a separate regulated offering.
